implemented_slice_constraints.migration_execution: verified snapshot-first hard-cutover schema 1 to 3 migration on explicitly authorized disposable stores only
implemented_slice_constraints.snapshot_execution: L08-W01 exact verified snapshot of one explicitly authorized named disposable store with durable receipt and explicit custody
implemented_slice_constraints.restore_execution: L08-W02 exact verified replacement of one explicitly authorized disposable target with retained verified prior copy and truthful terminal classification
implemented_slice_constraints.namespace_lifecycle: human-authorized create, rename, and retire with exact store identity, idempotent receipts, and operation-fence admission; retirement refuses namespaces that still home owners
implemented_slice_constraints.owner_rehome: human-authorized administrative owner placement change requiring exact active source and target namespaces; immutable placement event and receipt only, without semantic owner revision, version, selection, current-projection, or owner-event mutation
implemented_slice_constraints.local_access: ordinary Case, Frame, common, and identity access is workspace-wide by default with optional namespace_ids query narrowing; no view context or policy admission is used
implemented_slice_constraints.retired_operations: view-policy, export, observation/checkpoint/reconciliation, Case purge, impact, integrity, and projection operations fail closed before authority admission and are not admitted capabilities
implemented_slice_constraints.legacy_archive: schema 1 hard-cutover archives retired view-policy, consumer checkpoint, and receipt-policy association state before active schema removal
